main wall mass: stonebrick walls from y=2 up to y=4 (3 block high walls).

place single wooden door at entrance (bottom half).
entrance opening on front short side at x=6,z=0 from y=2..3 (one-block-high doorway).

second roof step (smaller) at y=7 forming raised center area.
stone slab caps on corners of first roof step for decorative light caps (placed at four outer corners).

right long-wall window row: three glass panes at y=3 spanning z=4..6.
front short-wall centered window (three-wide along x): three glass panes at y=3 x=4..6 z=1. This leaves space for entrance offset to one side.
